items.headline: Is Autodesk (ADSK) One of the Best Big Tech Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts?
items.summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the best big tech stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. BNP Paribas initiated coverage of Autodesk, Inc. items.headline: Is Autodesk’s (ADSK) $350 Million AI Education Push Quietly Reshaping Its Ecosystem Moat?
items.summary: In June 2026, Autodesk announced a US$350 million, three-year commitment to expand free access to its professional tools, AI-focused training, and certifications for designers, engineers, builders, manufacturers, creatives, and skilled tradespeople worldwide, targeting 60 million additional students and educators by 2028 and nearly one million learners for AI-powered “Design and Make” skills. This move deepens Autodesk’s role in shaping the future workforce by embedding its software into...

items.headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Commits $350 Million To Train The Next AI Design Workforce
items.summary: Autodesk announced a $350 million, multi-year global initiative to expand free access, training, and certification for AI-powered design and manufacturing skills. The program targets 60 million students and educators and aims to train nearly one million individuals in AI-driven workflows. The initiative will run worldwide in partnership with major educational and industrial training institutions. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:ADSK, this move lands at a time when the stock has faced...

items.headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim After Q1 Beat And MaintainX Deal
items.summary: Autodesk's updated fair value estimate of US$318.53, slightly below the prior US$319.27 level, reflects only a marginal adjustment to the analyst price target framework. This tweak comes as researchers balance solid Q1 results, the planned US$3.6b MaintainX acquisition, and shifting sector multiples against questions on the pace of the core business. As you read on, you will see how these moving parts shape the evolving Autodesk story and what to watch to stay in step with the next round of...

items.headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Raises Borrowing Capacity Through Revolving Credit Facility Adjustments
items.summary: Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the 10 oversold stocks offering high upside. On June 15, Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) announced adjustments to its existing Revolving Credit Facility. The company increased its borrowing capacity to $2 billion from $1.5 billion, executed with a banking syndicate involving major names such as Citibank, Morgan Stanley, BNP Paribas, and […]
